meta.title: תוכנית שנתית · אנגלית · תנופה · כיתה ז'
meta.subject: אנגלית
meta.examLabel: אין מבחן חיצוני · אבחון פנימי בלבד
meta.basedOn: english-3year-plan.md · english-grade7.md · English Curriculum 2020 · CEFR Companion Volume 2020
meta.pedagogicalApproach: CLT + Lexical Approach · Thematic Units · 4-shlavi scaffolding · אין mock exams בז'

units.name: Unit 0 · Bridge from Elementary
units.description: אבחון פתיחה · phonics · 50 sight words · classroom language · ABCs revisited · 20 chunks ראשונים. בלי זה — אי אפשר להתחיל יחידות תמטיות.

units.name: Unit 1 · About Me
units.description: Self-introduction · `to be` · subject pronouns · possessive adjectives · message + notice. סוף יחידה: About Me poster.

units.name: Unit 2 · My Family & Home
units.description: Family + home vocab · `there is/are` · plurals · possessive `'s` · flyer + comic strip. סוף יחידה: Family tree + description.

units.name: Unit 3 · School Life
units.description: School vocab · Present Simple · time markers · timetable reading. סוף יחידה: My dream school.

units.name: Unit 4 · Daily Routine
units.description: Daily activity chunks · Present Simple מורחב · frequency adverbs · instructions reading · diary entry קצר. סוף יחידה: Day-in-my-life infographic.

units.name: Unit 5 · Food & Drink
units.description: Food vocab · likes/dislikes · `I like + V-ing` · advertisement reading · letter writing. סוף יחידה: Class poll + 3-sentence presentation.

units.name: Unit 6 · My City
units.description: Places + prepositions · Present Continuous · flyer + directions · simple map reading. סוף יחידה: My neighborhood description.

units.name: Unit 7 · Free Time & Year Project
units.description: Hobbies + sports · Present Simple vs. Continuous · letter to pen-pal · **Year Project** — Mini-magazine. כולל Lexical Notebook review.

topics: אבחון Cambridge Placement (1ש)
תיאום ציפיות + הצגת Lexical Notebook + יעדי השנה (2ש)
ABCs revisited — sounds + sight words intro (1ש)
Vowel patterns: a/e/i/o/u short vs. long (1ש)
Consonant blends: bl, br, ch, sh, th (2ש)
Silent letters: knee, write, lamb (1ש)
Sight words 1-25: the, a, is, are, my, you, with, to, from, for... (2ש)
Sight words 26-50: have, do, go, come, see, know, think... (1ש)
TPR — Total Physical Response ("Stand up! Touch your nose!") (1ש)
Classroom language chunks: open your book, raise your hand, work in pairs, listen carefully (2ש)
20 chunks: `my name is`, `I'm from`, `I live in`, `I have a...`, `I like...` (2ש)
Bridge Assessment — שמיעה + reading sight words + writing name/age (1ש)
Lexical Notebook — סיכום שבוע ראשון (1ש)
Self-introduction chunks: `my name is`, `I'm ___ years old`, `I'm from`, `I live in` (1ש)
`to be` — am/is/are: affirmative + negative + questions (2ש)
Listening — kids introducing themselves around the world (1ש)
I/you/he/she/it/we/they — usage with `to be` (1ש)
Possessive adjectives: my, your, his, her, its, our, their (2ש)
Speaking — Pair interview: ask 4 questions and answer (1ש)
Reading — message text type (`Hi! My name is Sara...`) (1ש)
Reading — notice (`Lost & Found: blue backpack`) (1ש)
Writing — message to pen-pal: 20 words (2ש)

weeks.focus: Unit 1 wrap · About Me Poster + Assessment
topics: About Me poster — תמונה + 5 משפטים + דגל מדינה (2ש)
Speaking — Self-introduction circle (1ש)
Unit 1 Assessment: reading + writing + speaking (1ש)
Family chunks: live with, spend time with, get along with, my best friend (1ש)
Family vocab: mother, father, brother, sister, grandparents, aunt, uncle (2ש)
Listening — kid describes his family (1ש)
Home vocab: room, kitchen, bedroom, bathroom, garden, balcony (1ש)
`there is / there are` — affirmative + negative + questions (2ש)
Furniture: bed, chair, table, sofa, lamp, window (1ש)
Regular plurals: cat/cats, box/boxes, baby/babies (1ש)
Irregular plurals: man/men, child/children, woman/women (1ש)
Reading — flyer (`House for rent`) + comic strip (family scene) (2ש)

weeks.focus: Unit 2 wrap · Family Tree Project + Assessment
topics: Writing — Family tree description (20-25 מילים) (2ש)
Speaking — describe your family in 5 sentences (1ש)
Unit 2 Assessment (1ש)

weeks.focus: Unit 3 · School Vocabulary + Present Simple intro
topics: School subjects: math, English, history, science, P.E., art, music (1ש)
School objects: notebook, pencil case, eraser, board, locker (1ש)
Present Simple — affirmative: `I play, you play, we play` (2ש)
Present Simple — 3rd person -s: `he plays, she watches, it works` (2ש)
Spelling rules: study → studies, go → goes, fix → fixes (1ש)
Negative + questions: `He doesn't play`, `Does she play?` (1ש)
Days of week + ordinal numbers (1st, 2nd, 3rd...) (1ש)
Time: o'clock, half past, quarter past/to (1ש)
Reading — **timetable** (חשיפה ראשונה לסוג טקסט תנופה) (2ש)

weeks.focus: Unit 3 wrap · Dream School + Mid-Year Assessment
topics: Writing — My dream school (25 מילים) (1ש)
Speaking — "What's your favorite subject? Why?" (1ש)
Mid-Year Assessment — reading (timetable) + writing 25 words + speaking (2ש)
Daily routine chunks: wake up, get dressed, brush teeth, have breakfast (1ש)
More chunks: go to school, come home, do homework, go to bed (2ש)
Speaking — describe your morning in 5 sentences (1ש)
Frequency adverbs: always, usually, often, sometimes, never (1ש)
Position rules: before main verb / after `to be` (2ש)
Time markers: in the morning, at 7, on weekdays, every day (1ש)
Reading — instructions (`how to make a sandwich`) (1ש)
Diary entry structure — date, opening, body (1ש)
Writing — diary entry קצר על יום שלי (25 מילים) (2ש)
Day-in-my-life infographic (תמונות + טקסט) (2ש)
Unit 4 Assessment — diary entry + Present Simple (1ש)
Food types: fruits, vegetables, dairy, meat, drinks (1ש)
Meal chunks: have breakfast/lunch/dinner, order pizza, cook dinner (2ש)
Listening — kids describe favorite food (1ש)
weeks.note: 🎯 בכיתה ט' תנופה אנגלית 11.2 — לא רלוונטי לז' אבל מודעות

topics: `I like + V-ing` / `I don't like + V-ing` (1ש)
Chunks: I love..., I hate..., My favorite is..., would like... (2ש)
Speaking — Pair interview about food preferences (1ש)
Reading — advertisement (restaurant) (1ש)
Simple menu reading (1ש)
Writing — letter to friend about favorite meal (25-30 מילים) (2ש)
Class poll — favorite food (1ש)
3-sentence presentation (1ש)
Unit 5 Assessment — letter writing (2ש)
Places: school, hospital, park, shop, restaurant, library (1ש)
Prepositions of place: in, on, under, next to, between, behind, in front of (2ש)
Speaking — describe classroom using prepositions (1ש)
Present Continuous (`is/are + V-ing`) — picture description (2ש)
Directions chunks: go straight, turn left/right, on your right (1ש)
Reading — flyer of city event + simple map (1ש)
Writing — short description of your neighborhood (25 מילים) (1ש)
Listening — walking directions (1ש)
Unit 6 Assessment (1ש)
Hobbies vocab: sports, music, reading, gaming, drawing (1ש)
Chunks: in my free time, I love to..., I'm good at... (1ש)
**Year Project setup** — choose your topic for Mini-magazine (2ש)
Reading — comic strip of kid with hobby + short blog post (חשיפה לח') (2ש)
Project development — Plan + first draft (2ש)

weeks.focus: Unit 7 · Letter to Pen-pal + Project Presentations
topics: Writing — letter to pen-pal about hobby (30 מילים) (1ש)
Project presentations — Mini-magazine pages (2ש)
Peer feedback (1ש)

weeks.focus: Unit 7 wrap · Lexical Notebook Review + Year Reflection
topics: Lexical Notebook full review — 80 chunks (2ש)
Year reflection — what I learned + summer reading list (1ש)
Preview of grade ח' + Cambridge Re-test prep (1ש)

hoursDistribution.totalDoesNotEqualSumWarning: סך השעות לפי skill (128) שונה מהסכום לפי unit כי הוראה אינטגרטיבית — אותה שעה משרתת מספר skills במקביל.
